classified_questions.question: In the solution interval $x \in \left(-\infty,-\frac{7}{4}\right) \cup \left(-\frac{3}{2},\infty\right),$ how did you determine which intervals satisfy the inequality and which ones don't?

classified_questions.question: Can you think of other types of inequalities where we can use this same type of analysis to determine the solution interval?
